pr.title: Record: DominationV2 + BOS-Reset Bigram Cache + TTT (val_bpb=1.1382, 3-seed mean)

output.summary: DominationV2 U-Net stack adds eval-time BOS-reset bigram cache blending entropy-gated counts with model probs after TTT and quantization.
techniques: DominationV2 U-Net + SmearGate + BigramHash core stack
BOS-reset bigram cache mixes counts with model probs via entropy gating
TTT post-quantization prep before sliding-window eval
